use_codes.desc: RECTIV IS A NITRATE VASODILATOR INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF MODERATE TO SEVERE PAIN ASSOCIATED WITH CHRONIC ANAL FISSURE

indications.text:
RECTIV® (nitroglycerin) Ointment 0.4% is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe pain
associated with chronic anal fissure.

RECTIVTM (nitroglycerin) Ointment 0.4% is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe pain
associated with chronic anal fissure.
